title: Bubbles component wrappers
definition_of_done: NewSpinner, NewProgressBar, NewTable, NewViewport constructors implemented; go build ./internal/tui/... passes
outcome: Created internal/tui/components.go with NewSpinner, NewProgressBar, NewTable, NewViewport; go build passes

notes.msg: Implemented NewSpinner, NewProgressBar, NewTable, NewViewport constructors in internal/tui/components.go using bubbles v0.20.0. Added missing go.sum entry for charmbracelet/harmonica (transitive dep of bubbles/progress). go build ./internal/tui/... and go build ./... both pass.
